name: IdsEdwBnfVndrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in AS ( SELECT BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_SK, COALESCE(CD_SRC.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, BNF_VNDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_ID, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_NM, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO, BNF_VNDR.USER_ID, BNF_VNDR.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO_EXT, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK, COALESCE(CD_TYP.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD, COALESCE(CD_TYP.TRGT_CD_NM, 'UNK') AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_VNDR AS BNF_VNDR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD_SRC ON BNF_VNDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD_SRC.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD_TYP ON BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK = CD_TYP.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_out AS ( SELECT cte_in.BNF_VNDR_SK AS BNF_VNDR_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_in.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_in.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_in.BNF_VNDR_ID AS BNF_VNDR_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_in.BNF_VNDR_NM, cte_in.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_in.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_in.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD END AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_in.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_in.BNF_VNDR_TYP_NM END AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_NM, cte_in.USER_ID, cte_in.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_in.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK, cte_in.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO_EXT FROM cte_in ) SELECT * FROM cte_out

Description:

CALLED BY: EdwProductExtrSeq

PROCESSING: Extracts all IDS records and loads in to EDW BNF_VNDR_D table

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwBnfVndrDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table BNF_VNDR_D
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK
Write BNF_VNDR_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
